claimText: The IUCN World Conservation Congress 2025 was held in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
evidenceExcerpt: Congress 2025 held in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
examUse: Statement-based question on recent environmental summits and their locations.

claimText: At the 2025 Congress, the IUCN adopted a 20-year Strategic Vision titled 'Unite for Nature on the Path to 2045'.
evidenceExcerpt: Adopted 'Unite for Nature on the Path to 2045' 20-year Strategic Vision.
examUse: Statement-based question matching the strategic vision to the correct organization.
distractorHooks: Vision target year is 2030 instead of 2045

claimText: The IUCN World Conservation Congress 2025 adopted the first-ever motion advocating for a just phase-out of fossil fuels.
evidenceExcerpt: First-ever motion advocating for a just phase-out of fossil fuels adopted.
examUse: Statement-based question on key outcomes and resolutions of the IUCN Congress.
distractorHooks: Adopted at UNFCCC COP28 instead of IUCN
Advocated for a phase-down rather than a phase-out of fossil fuels

claimText: The IUCN was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Gland, Switzerland.
evidenceExcerpt: IUCN founded in 1948, located in Gland, Switzerland.
examUse: Institution-feature question or correct-pair matching for international organizations.
distractorHooks: Founded in 1972 during the Stockholm Conference

claimText: The Members' Assembly is the highest governing body of the IUCN and convenes every four years.
evidenceExcerpt: Members' Assembly is the highest governing body, held every 4 years.
examUse: Statement-based question on the governance structure of the IUCN.
distractorHooks: Governed primarily by the UN General Assembly

claimText: The IUCN publishes the IUCN Report on Protected Areas and the IUCN World Heritage Outlook.
evidenceExcerpt: Publishes IUCN Report on Protected Areas and IUCN World Heritage Outlook.
